title: NOT LIKE not working if the operand doesn't contains wildcards.
poc: create table test (id int, value text);
select * from test where value not like 'Bob';
select * from test where value not ilike 'Bob';
key_bug_features: NOT LIKE fails without wildcard characters in operand
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test (id int PRIMARY KEY, value text NOT NULL, age int CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO test (id, value, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30), (2, 'Bob', 25), (3, 'Carol', NULL);
CREATE TABLE additional_info (info_id int PRIMARY KEY, test_id int REFERENCES test(id), description text);
INSERT INTO additional_info (info_id, test_id, description) VALUES (1, 1, 'Engineer'), (2, 2, 'Designer');
SELECT * FROM test WHERE value NOT LIKE 'Bob';
